---
title: "Konstruksi Keadaan 3-Qubit Menggunakan Transformasi Matriks SU(2) dan SU(4)"
author: "Dosen Pembimbing<br>Prof. Agus Purwanto, D.Sc."
subtitle: "Alief Hisyam Al Hasany MR<br>NRP: 5001221098"
institute: "Departemen Fisika, FSAD ITS"
date: today

format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, template/custom.scss]
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    chalkboard: true
---

<!-- {{< include sections/01-cover.qmd >}} -->

<!-- {{< include sections/02-outline.qmd >}} -->

{{< include sections/03-Qubit.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/06-Keterbelitan-separab.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04-Tranformasi_Uniter.qmd >}}

<!-- {{< include sections/05-Matriks_Densitas_NQubit.qmd >}} -->


{{< include sections/07-Entropi.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/08-metodologi.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/09-parameterisasi-su.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/10-transformasi-su3-su4.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/11-hasil-klasifikasi.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/12-interpretasi-su4.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/13-kesimpulan.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/14-terima-kasih.qmd >}}
